calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Off Calendar

Memo Of P&A In Support Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

John C. Brown, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Jeff Sapiro.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Buckaroo Acquisition Corp. dba, Bebo.
Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Plaintiff Jeff Sapiro Sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $18,353.01
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $2,096.77
Attorney's Fees: $2,575.00
Costs: $370.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $23,394.78
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
